emptyVoicePrimarySubtitle: Tap the microphone and speak naturally — GyanGo listens and replies entirely on this device.
emptyTextModeSubtitle: Type a message, or attach an image to include the text on it (OCR). Switch to voice anytime from the toolbar.
loadingModelMessage: Getting the model ready — one moment.
assistantAwaitingStreamHints: GyanGo is lining this up entirely on your device — hang tight...
No cloud round-trip; your question stays on this phone while I think...
Taking a careful pass so the answer is easy to skim...
Still streaming — good reasoning is worth a short pause...
loadingDeviceModelSubtitle: The first launch can take a moment. Please stay on this screen.
onboardingProgressSavedHint: Your details are saved on this device as you type.
onboardingPadDownloadingHint: Brain model download is running in the background. You can continue setup.
onboardingPadWaitingHint: Waiting for network permission/connection to start the brain download. You can continue setup.
micMainContentDescription: Speak — listens in your chosen language; replies in that language.
chatToolbarReadAloudTurnOnDescription: Read aloud is off. Tap to turn on.
chatToolbarReadAloudTurnOffDescription: Read aloud is on. Tap to turn off.
brainNetworkSubtext: You're on Wi-Fi, so this is a good time to download everything for a smoother experience.
brainWaitingWifiSubtext: Wi-Fi is best for a stable download. We'll start automatically when this phone connects, or you can choose below.
brainPreparingSubtext: One-time setup — please keep this screen open until we finish.
onboardingIntroBody: Your phone. Your AI. Your privacy.
onboardingWelcomeBody: Tell me about yourself, your language, and what you'd like to chat in.
ttsSetupBody: To read answers aloud in this language, Android needs a speech package download. Continue to open Android setup.
onboardingHardwareUnsupportedTitle: This phone cannot run the model
onboardingHardwareUnsupportedBody: GyanGo needs a supported GPU or NPU and at least 6 GB of system memory. This device does not meet those requirements.
onboardingHardwareUnsupportedPerformance: The on-device model is about 2.3 GB. On low RAM or a CPU-only path it would be too slow or unstable for chat. Use a phone with a capable GPU or NPU and more than 6 GB RAM for a smooth experience.
settingsConversationLanguageHint: Language for assistant replies, on-screen chat text, and voice input. Applies to new messages after you change it.
settingsHubProfileSubtitle: Name, email, birth date, language, read-aloud
settingsBirthAgeHint: Used only to keep replies age-appropriate and safety-aware.
settingsChatLongAnswersHint: When on, replies can run longer. When off, we aim for quicker, shorter answers.
settingsChatReasoningHint: When on, the assistant adds a short private reasoning reminder. This can add a little time on some phones.
settingsChatCreativityHint: Lower stays steadier; higher allows more varied wording.
settingsChatLowPowerHint: No effect yet; reserved for a future speed vs battery balance.
settingsHubInterestsSubtitle: Themes GyanGo noticed — stored only on this phone
settingsInterestsEmpty: Nothing here yet. After some replies, GyanGo may add a small optional interest tag; if it doesn't, that's fine.
settingsInterestsHint: These stay in your conversation language and are not sent back into the model. Clear removes the list on this device.
onboardingHardwareNoAccelCard: No supported GPU or NPU — the on-device model can't run fast enough on this phone.
onboardingHardwareLowRamCard: Total memory is under about 6 GB — not enough headroom for this model size.
onboardingHardwareLowDiskCard: Free storage is low — we need roughly 3.5 GB free for a safe install or update.
